// COMMENT: Example configuration file for migrate.py — pass via --config config.json
// tableau_file: Path to the Tableau workbook (.twb or .twbx)
// prep_flow: Optional path to a Tableau Prep flow (.tfl or .tflx)
// output_dir: Output directory for generated .pbip projects (default: artifacts/fabric_projects/)
// model_mode: Semantic model connection mode: import | directquery | composite
// output_format: Output format: pbip (full project) | tmdl (semantic model only) | pbir (report only)
// culture: IETF locale tag for the semantic model (default: en-US)
// calendar_start: Start year for the auto-generated Calendar table (default: 2020)
// calendar_end: End year for the auto-generated Calendar table (default: 2030)
// rollback: If true, backup existing .pbip project before overwriting
// log_file: Optional file path for log output
